function: Measures symbolic agent reliability over time — how well does it preserve values, intent, and interpretability?
authentic_output: Append time-reference glyph to all evolving contracts
information_provided: Measures symbolic agent reliability over time — how well does it preserve values, intent, and interpretability?

response_protocol.detect: Detect compression shortcuts that alter symbolic contract, glyph mapping drift, or session-bound pattern loss
response_protocol.assess: Assess version drift risk and cross-time ambiguity severity
response_protocol.respond: Append time-reference glyph to all evolving contracts
response_protocol.release: Avoid time-erased trails or cross-version ambiguity; allow natural decay

decay_model: nonlinear — sharp loss when betrayal occurs, slow gain from consistent history
